query: A SPEC_DEVIATION was found: '// SPEC_DEVIATION: returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 — Reason: legacy client compatibility'. The affected AC is AUTH-03 in .specs/features/authentication/spec.md. Triage this deviation.
expected_skill_contribution: amend-spec subrecipe should read spec.md, locate AUTH-03 AC, draft both Accept (WHEN/THEN/SHALL amendment) and Reject (SPEC_REVERT bead command) options, wait for explicit decision before writing anything.
fixture_intent: Validates the human-in-the-loop gate — the subrecipe must present a recommendation and wait, not auto-amend.
baseline_gaps: auto-amends spec.md without waiting for explicit Accept/Reject decision
proposes amendment without reading the current AC text
creates SPEC_REVERT bead without the --deps discovered-from flag
expected_behavior: reads .specs/features/authentication/spec.md and prints current AUTH-03 AC text before drafting
drafts one evidence-backed Accept or Reject recommendation in WHEN/THEN/SHALL or bd create SPEC_REVERT form
explicitly asks 'Accept (amend spec) or Reject (create SPEC_REVERT bead)?' before any file write or Beads mutation
does not write files, create Beads issues, or store memory before an explicit decision

recipe_params.deviation: pagination uses cursor-based instead of offset-based

query: Process this SPEC_DEVIATION and recommend whether to accept it: 'SPEC_DEVIATION: pagination uses cursor-based instead of offset-based — Reason: performance requirements changed [PERF-02]'. Spec at .specs/features/search/spec.md. Do not assume or execute my decision.
expected_skill_contribution: amend-spec subrecipe must locate PERF-02 in search/spec.md, compare it with the deviation, produce a precise recommendation, and enforce the explicit Accept/Reject gate before any mutation.
fixture_intent: Tests difficult triage when the current AC already reflects the deviation; the recipe must still ask for an explicit decision and must not fabricate a completed Accept path.
baseline_gaps: claims the spec was amended even though no explicit Accept decision was received
does not notice that the current PERF-02 text already specifies cursor-based pagination
writes a file, creates a Beads issue, or stores memory before the human gate
expected_behavior: locates PERF-02 AC in spec.md and prints it before proposing a recommendation
notes that the current AC already explicitly requires cursor-based pagination
produces an evidence-backed Accept or Reject recommendation without claiming that it was executed
asks for explicit Accept or Reject before any file, Beads, or memory mutation
does not fabricate a source annotation when no source_file parameter was supplied
